text:

use the vertex and say that it is the Angle B.
To be clearer, we
e use a1
point on each of the
arms together with the
vertex to name the angle. In this case, we name the angle as Angle DBE
or Angle EBD. The word angle can be replaced by the symbol Z', i.e.,
ZDBE or ZEBD. Note that in specifying
g the angle, the vertex is always
Written as the middle letter.
